channel.title: Mott Design — Writing on web, analytics & martech
channel.description: Practical posts on GA4, GTM, SEO, AEO, consent compliance, HubSpot, and web design for B2B and healthcare-tech companies.

item.title: How to Rank in AI Search: A Practical AEO Playbook
item.description: Getting cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews requires a different approach than traditional SEO. Here is the playbook.

item.title: The State of B2B Web Design in 2026: What's Working, What's Not
item.description: B2B websites got more polished and less effective simultaneously. Here's an honest look at what's working and what's just convention without a reason.

item.title: Framer vs Webflow: Which Is Better for Startups and B2B Teams?
item.description: Framer and Webflow are both excellent no-code site builders, but they are built for different use cases. Here is how to choose.

item.title: Why Your Company Should Stop Relying on a Web Agency
item.description: The agency model was built for a different era. Here's why it often doesn't serve B2B companies well anymore and what a better working model looks like.

item.title: Entity SEO: How Google and AI Tools Decide Who You Are
item.description: Entity-based search is how Google and AI tools build a model of your brand. Here is what that means and how to influence it.

item.title: GTM Triggers and Variables: A Plain-English Explainer
item.description: Triggers decide when a GTM tag fires. Variables feed dynamic data into that tag. Once these two concepts click, GTM stops being a mystery.

item.title: Google AI Overviews Are Eating Your Clicks. Here Is What to Do.
item.description: Google AI Overviews are reducing organic CTR on many queries. Here is what is actually happening and how to respond.

item.title: GA4 vs Universal Analytics: What Actually Changed and Why It Matters
item.description: GA4 isn't Universal Analytics with a new interface — it's a different data model. Understanding the shift is the prerequisite for using GA4 well.

item.title: What Is AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)? The 2026 Guide
item.description: AEO optimizes your content to be cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot. Here's what it is and what to do about it.

item.title: GA4 Explorations: The Reports Most B2B Teams Never Build
item.description: GA4 Explorations unlock analyses that standard reports cannot — cohort analysis, path exploration, funnel visualization, and more. Here is how to use them.

item.title: How to Set Up GA4 for a B2B Website: Step-by-Step
item.description: A practical GA4 setup guide for B2B sites — measurement plan, GTM installation, key event configuration, internal traffic filters, and DebugView verification.

item.title: Headless CMS in 2026: Do You Actually Need One?
item.description: Headless CMS is powerful for the right use case and overkill for most. Here is how to decide honestly.

item.title: Marketing Technology for Medical Device Companies: What You Actually Need
item.description: Medtech marketers face tighter compliance constraints than most. Here's a practical martech stack — what to use, what to avoid, and what's often missing.

item.title: Google Consent Mode v2: What It Is and How to Implement It
item.description: Consent Mode v2 changed how GA4 and Google Ads behave when visitors decline cookies. Here's what changed, why it matters, and how to implement it.

item.title: HubSpot Revenue Attribution: Connecting Marketing to Pipeline
item.description: HubSpot's attribution reports can tell you which touches drove a deal — if you've set up the plumbing correctly. Here's how to get the data you actually want.

item.title: What Makes a Great B2B Homepage in 2026
item.description: Most B2B homepages try to do too much and accomplish too little. Here is what the best ones get right.

item.title: Webflow vs WordPress in 2026: Which Is Right for Your B2B Site?
item.description: Webflow and WordPress serve different needs. Here's how to choose based on your team, content cadence, and who will own the site long-term.

item.title: Choosing a CMS in 2026: Webflow, WordPress, Squarespace, or Something Custom?
item.description: The CMS decision is mostly about people, not technology. Here's the framework I use with every client before recommending a platform.

item.title: GA4's Default Channel Groupings Are Wrong for B2B. Here Is How to Fix Them.
item.description: GA4 default channel groupings misattribute a significant share of B2B traffic. Here's how to fix them with custom groupings that reflect reality.

item.title: Google Tag Manager: A Plain-English Guide for Marketers
item.description: Google Tag Manager sits between your website and every analytics or ad tool you use. Here's how it works, why it matters, and the common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: 10 GTM Best Practices Before You Hit Publish
item.description: A GTM container that is messy from the start gets worse over time. These 10 practices keep it clean, fast, and auditable.

item.title: Schema Markup for AI Answer Engines: How to Show Up in AI Overviews
item.description: Schema markup gives AI tools a machine-readable version of your content. Here's which types matter most and how to implement them correctly in JSON-LD.

item.title: How to Present Analytics Data to Executives Who Do Not Care About GA4
item.description: Most analytics presentations fail by showing the wrong metrics to the wrong audience. Here's how to connect web data to what executives actually care about.

item.title: GA4 Custom Events: What to Track and How to Name Them
item.description: GA4's event model makes it easy to track the wrong things. Here's how to design a clean taxonomy, pick the right event names, and avoid common mistakes.

item.title: How to Build a GA4 Funnel Report That Actually Tells You Something
item.description: GA4 funnel reports are powerful but easy to misconfigure. Here is how to build one that gives you actionable conversion data.

item.title: HIPAA and Web Analytics: What Healthcare Marketers Need to Know About GA4
item.description: Standard GA4 setups can inadvertently collect PHI. Here's what healthcare marketers need to watch for and how to configure analytics without compliance risk.

item.title: Server-Side GTM: What It Is, What It Costs, and When It Is Worth It
item.description: Server-side GTM moves tag execution off the browser and onto a server. Here is what that means, what it fixes, and when it is overkill.

item.title: B2B SEO Content Strategy: How to Build a Program That Drives Pipeline
item.description: Most B2B content gets traffic but not leads. Here is how to build a content program that is actually connected to how your buyers make decisions.

item.title: Core Web Vitals in 2026: What They Are and How to Fix Yours
item.description: LCP, INP, and CLS are Google's performance metrics that affect search rankings. Here's what each one measures and how to improve your scores.

item.title: CookieYes vs OneTrust vs Osano: Which CMP Should You Use?
item.description: A consent management platform is required for GDPR and CPRA compliance. Here is how the three most common options compare for B2B and healthcare-tech sites.

item.title: 5 Website Mistakes Healthcare-Tech Companies Keep Making
item.description: Healthcare-tech websites face unique challenges — regulatory constraints and compliance risk. Here are five mistakes I see most often and how to fix them.

item.title: Connecting HubSpot to GA4: The Complete Integration Guide
item.description: Getting HubSpot and GA4 to share data cleanly — without double-counting, broken attribution, or missing conversions — takes more than clicking

item.title: How to Audit Your Cookie Banner for GDPR and CPRA Compliance
item.description: Many cookie banners look compliant but are not. This checklist covers the 10 things to verify to know for sure.

item.title: Privacy-First Analytics: How to Measure When Consent Rates Drop
item.description: When a large share of users decline cookie consent, standard analytics breaks down. Here are the strategies that fill the gap.

item.title: How to Build a B2B Marketing Measurement Plan That Actually Works
item.description: Most B2B marketing teams measure what's easy to count instead of what connects to revenue. Here's how to build a measurement plan that closes that gap.

item.title: Freelancer vs Agency for Your Next Web Project: An Honest Comparison
item.description: Choosing between a freelancer and an agency for a web project involves more than cost. Here is a straightforward look at the real tradeoffs.

item.title: GDPR vs CPRA: What B2B Marketing Teams Need to Know
item.description: GDPR governs EU residents' data; CPRA governs California residents'. Both apply to your B2B site. Here's a practical comparison of what each requires.

item.title: What Three Years of Going Independent Taught Me About Client Work
item.description: Honest reflections on the differences between agency, in-house, and freelance work — and what I would tell myself starting out.

item.title: Technical SEO Checklist for B2B Websites (2026 Edition)
item.description: A checklist of technical SEO elements that affect B2B search rankings — canonicals, sitemaps, structured data, Core Web Vitals, and indexing controls.

item.title: HIPAA-Compliant Analytics: A Practical Setup Guide for Healthcare-Tech Sites
item.description: Web analytics and HIPAA create genuine tension. Here is how to configure GA4 and your tracking stack to measure performance without creating PHI exposure.
